id: [BetaManagedAgentsModel](api/beta.md)Óāö

The model that will power your agent.

See [models](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/models-overview) for additional details and options.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

"claude-fable-5" or "claude-opus-4-8" or "claude-opus-4-7" or 8 moreÓāö

The model that will power your agent.

See [models](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/models-overview) for additional details and options.

One of the following:

"claude-fable-5"Óāö

Next generation of intelligence for the hardest knowledge work and coding problems

"claude-opus-4-8"Óāö

Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding

"claude-opus-4-7"Óāö

Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding

"claude-opus-4-6"Óāö

Most intelligent model for building agents and coding

"claude-sonnet-4-6"Óāö

Best combination of speed and intelligence

"claude-haiku-4-5"Óāö

Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence

"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001"Óāö

Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence

"claude-opus-4-5"Óāö

Premium model combining maximum intelligence with practical performance

"claude-opus-4-5-20251101"Óāö

Premium model combining maximum intelligence with practical performance

"claude-sonnet-4-5"Óāö

High-performance model for agents and coding

"claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929"Óāö

High-performance model for agents and coding

stringÓāö

ÓÄ™

speed: optional "standard" or "fast"Óāö

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

"standard"Óāö

"fast"Óāö

ÓÄ™

multiagent: [BetaManagedAgentsMultiagent](api/beta.md) { agents, type } Óāö

Resolved coordinator topology with a concrete agent roster.

ÓÄ™

agents: array of [BetaManagedAgentsAgentReference](api/beta.md) { id, type, version } Óāö

Agents the coordinator may spawn as session threads, each resolved to a specific version.

id: stringÓāö

type: "agent"Óāö

version: numberÓāö

type: "coordinator"Óāö

name: stringÓāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolset20260401BashInput object { command, restart, timeout\_ms } Óāö

Input payload for the `bash` tool of the
`agent_toolset_20260401` toolset. All fields are optional;
a normal invocation supplies `command`, while `restart=true`
(with no `command`) reboots the runner-side bash session.

command: optional stringÓāö

Shell command to execute. Omit only when `restart` is true.

restart: optional booleanÓāö

When true, restart the persistent bash session instead of
running a command. Subsequent calls without `restart` will
run against the fresh session.

timeout\_ms: optional numberÓāö

Per-call timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to the
runner-wide tool timeout when omitted or zero.

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolset20260401EditInput object { file\_path, new\_string, old\_string, replace\_all } Óāö

Input payload for the `edit` tool. Performs a string
replacement in the named file; by default `old_string` must
occur exactly once.

file\_path: stringÓāö

Path of the file to edit.

new\_string: stringÓāö

Replacement text.

old\_string: stringÓāö

Substring to find and replace.

replace\_all: optional booleanÓāö

When true, replace every occurrence of `old_string`
instead of requiring a unique match.

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolset20260401GlobInput object { pattern, path } Óāö

Input payload for the `glob` tool. Returns paths matching a
doublestar glob pattern, newest first.

pattern: stringÓāö

Doublestar glob pattern (e.g. `**/*.go`). Absolute patterns
are only permitted when the runner is configured to allow
them.

path: optional stringÓāö

Optional directory root to search under. Defaults to the
runner's working directory.

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolset20260401GrepInput object { pattern, path } Óāö

Input payload for the `grep` tool. Searches file contents for
a regular expression, returning matching lines.

pattern: stringÓāö

Regular expression to search for.

path: optional stringÓāö

Optional directory root to search under. Defaults to the
runner's working directory.

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolset20260401Params object { type, configs, default\_config } Óāö

type: "agent\_toolset\_20260401"Óāö

BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolset20260401ReadInput object { file\_path, view\_range } Óāö

Input payload for the `read` tool. Reads file contents
relative to the runner's working directory (or absolute when
the runner permits).

file\_path: stringÓāö

Path of the file to read.

view\_range: optional array of numberÓāö

Optional `[start_line, end_line]` 1-indexed inclusive
range. When omitted the entire file is returned.
`end_line` of 0 or negative means "to end of file".

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolset20260401WriteInput object { content, file\_path } Óāö

Input payload for the `write` tool. Writes (overwriting) the
entire file contents.

content: stringÓāö

Full file contents to write.

file\_path: stringÓāö

Path of the file to write.

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsAlwaysAllowPolicy object { type } Óāö

Tool calls are automatically approved without user confirmation.

type: "always\_allow"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsAlwaysAskPolicy object { type } Óāö

Tool calls require user confirmation before execution.

type: "always\_ask"Óāö

BetaManagedAgentsCustomToolParams object { description, input\_schema, name, type } Óāö

A custom tool that is executed by the API client rather than the agent. When the agent calls this tool, an `agent.custom_tool_use` event is emitted and the session goes idle, waiting for the client to provide the result via a `user.custom_tool_result` event.

description: stringÓāö

Description of what the tool does, shown to the agent to help it decide when to use the tool. 1-1024 characters.

ÓÄ™

input\_schema: [BetaManagedAgentsCustomToolInputSchema](api/beta.md) { type, properties, required } Óāö

JSON Schema for custom tool input parameters.

type: "object"Óāö

properties: optional map[unknown]Óāö

required: optional array of stringÓāö

name: stringÓāö

Unique name for the tool. 1-128 characters; letters, digits, underscores, and hyphens.

type: "custom"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsMultiagentCoordinator object { agents, type } Óāö

Resolved coordinator topology with a concrete agent roster.

ÓÄ™

agents: array of [BetaManagedAgentsAgentReference](api/beta.md) { id, type, version } Óāö

Agents the coordinator may spawn as session threads, each resolved to a specific version.

id: stringÓāö

type: "agent"Óāö

version: numberÓāö

type: "coordinator"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsMultiagentCoordinatorParams object { agents, type } Óāö

A coordinator topology: the session's primary thread orchestrates work by spawning session threads, each running an agent drawn from the `agents` roster.

ÓÄ™

agents: array of [BetaManagedAgentsMultiagentRosterEntryParams](api/beta.md)Óāö

Agents the coordinator may spawn as session threads. 1‚Äď20 entries. Each entry is an agent ID string, a versioned `{"type":"agent","id","version"}` reference, or `{"type":"self"}` to allow recursive self-invocation. Entries must reference distinct agents (after resolving `self` and string forms); at most one `self`. Referenced agents must exist, must not be archived, and must not themselves have `multiagent` set (depth limit 1).

One of the following:

stringÓāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsAgentParams object { id, type, version } Óāö

Specification for an Agent. Provide a specific `version` or use the short-form `agent="agent_id"` for the most recent version

id: stringÓāö

The `agent` ID.

type: "agent"Óāö

version: optional numberÓāö

The specific `agent` version to use. Omit to use the latest version. Must be at least 1 if specified.

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsMultiagentSelfParams object { type } Óāö

Sentinel roster entry meaning "the agent that owns this configuration". Resolved server-side to a concrete agent reference.

type: "self"Óāö

type: "coordinator"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsMultiagentSelfParams object { type } Óāö

Sentinel roster entry meaning "the agent that owns this configuration". Resolved server-side to a concrete agent reference.

type: "self"Óāö

description: stringÓāö

#### BetaAgentsVersions

##### [List Agent Versions](api/beta/agents/versions/list.md)

GET/v1/agents/{agent\_id}/versions

#### BetaEnvironments

##### [Create Environment](api/beta/environments/create.md)

POST/v1/environments

##### [List Environments](api/beta/environments/list.md)

GET/v1/environments

##### [Get Environment](api/beta/environments/retrieve.md)

GET/v1/environments/{environment\_id}

##### [Update Environment](api/beta/environments/update.md)

POST/v1/environments/{environment\_id}

##### [Delete Environment](api/beta/environments/delete.md)

DELETE/v1/environments/{environment\_id}

##### [Archive Environment](api/beta/environments/archive.md)

POST/v1/environments/{environment\_id}/archive

BetaLimitedNetwork object { allow\_mcp\_servers, allow\_package\_managers, allowed\_hosts, type } Óāö

Limited network access.

allow\_package\_managers: booleanÓāö

Specifies domains the container can reach.

ÓÄ™

BetaLimitedNetworkParams object { type, allow\_mcp\_servers, allow\_package\_managers, allowed\_hosts } Óāö

Fields default to null; on update, omitted fields preserve the
existing value.

type: "limited"Óāö

Network policy type

allow\_mcp\_servers: optional booleanÓāö

Permits outbound access to MCP server endpoints configured on the agent, beyond those listed in the `allowed_hosts` array. Defaults to `false`.

allow\_package\_managers: optional booleanÓāö

Permits outbound access to public package registries (PyPI, npm, etc.) beyond those listed in the `allowed_hosts` array. Defaults to `false`.

allowed\_hosts: optional array of stringÓāö

Specifies domains the container can reach.

ÓÄ™

packages: optional [BetaPackagesParams](api/beta.md) { apt, cargo, gem, 4 more } Óāö

Specify packages (and optionally their versions) available in this environment.

When versioning, use the version semantics relevant for the package manager, e.g. for `pip` use `package==1.0.0`. You are responsible for validating the package and version exist. Unversioned installs the latest.

Ubuntu/Debian packages to install

cargo: optional array of stringÓāö

Rust packages to install

gem: optional array of stringÓāö

Ruby packages to install

go: optional array of stringÓāö

Go packages to install

npm: optional array of stringÓāö

Node.js packages to install

pip: optional array of stringÓāö

Python packages to install

type: optional "packages"Óāö

Package configuration type

BetaLimitedNetwork object { allow\_mcp\_servers, allow\_package\_managers, allowed\_hosts, type } Óāö

Limited network access.

Permits outbound access to MCP server endpoints configured on the agent, beyond those listed in the `allowed_hosts` array.

allow\_package\_managers: booleanÓāö

Specifies domains the container can reach.

Network policy type

ÓÄ™

BetaLimitedNetworkParams object { type, allow\_mcp\_servers, allow\_package\_managers, allowed\_hosts } Óāö

Limited network request params.

Fields default to null; on update, omitted fields preserve the
existing value.

type: "limited"Óāö

Network policy type

allow\_mcp\_servers: optional booleanÓāö

Permits outbound access to MCP server endpoints configured on the agent, beyond those listed in the `allowed_hosts` array. Defaults to `false`.

allow\_package\_managers: optional booleanÓāö

Permits outbound access to public package registries (PyPI, npm, etc.) beyond those listed in the `allowed_hosts` array. Defaults to `false`.

allowed\_hosts: optional array of stringÓāö

Specifies domains the container can reach.

BetaPackagesParams object { apt, cargo, gem, 4 more } Óāö

Specify packages (and optionally their versions) available in this environment.

BetaSelfHostedWork object { id, acknowledged\_at, created\_at, 9 more } Óāö

Work resource representing a unit of work in a self-hosted environment.

Work items are queued when sessions are created or when long-dormant sessions
receive new messages. The environment worker polls for work to execute in a
self-hosted sandbox.

id: stringÓāö

Work identifier (e.g., 'work\_...')

acknowledged\_at: stringÓāö

RFC 3339 timestamp when the work item was acknowledged and assigned to a self-hosted sandbox

created\_at: stringÓāö

RFC 3339 timestamp when work was created

ÓÄ™

BetaSelfHostedWorkQueueStats object { depth, oldest\_queued\_at, pending, 2 more } Óāö

Statistics about the work queue for an environment.

Uses Redis Stream consumer group metrics for O(1) queries.

depth: numberÓāö

Number of work items waiting to be picked up (lag from consumer group)

oldest\_queued\_at: stringÓāö

RFC 3339 timestamp of oldest item in the work stream (includes both queued and pending items), null if stream empty

pending: numberÓāö

Number of work items being processed (polled but not acknowledged)

type: "work\_queue\_stats"Óāö

The type of object

workers\_polling: numberÓāö

Number of workers that have polled for work in the last 30 seconds. Requires worker\_id to be sent with poll requests.

ÓÄ™

BetaSelfHostedWorkStopRequest object { force } Óāö

Request to stop a work item.

force: optional booleanÓāö

If true, immediately stop work without graceful shutdown

ÓÄ™

BetaSelfHostedWorkUpdateRequest object { metadata } Óāö

Request to update work item metadata.

metadata: map[string]Óāö

Metadata patch. Set a key to a string to upsert it, or to null to delete it. Omit the field to preserve existing metadata.

Session identifier (e.g., 'session\_...')

type: "session"Óāö

type: "coordinator"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsMultiagentParams object { agents, type } Óāö

A coordinator topology: the session's primary thread orchestrates work by spawning session threads, each running an agent drawn from the `agents` roster.

ÓÄ™

agents: array of [BetaManagedAgentsMultiagentRosterEntryParams](api/beta.md)Óāö

Agents the coordinator may spawn as session threads. 1‚Äď20 entries. Each entry is an agent ID string, a versioned `{"type":"agent","id","version"}` reference, or `{"type":"self"}` to allow recursive self-invocation. Entries must reference distinct agents (after resolving `self` and string forms); at most one `self`. Referenced agents must exist, must not be archived, and must not themselves have `multiagent` set (depth limit 1).

One of the following:

stringÓāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsAgentParams object { id, type, version } Óāö

Specification for an Agent. Provide a specific `version` or use the short-form `agent="agent_id"` for the most recent version

id: stringÓāö

The `agent` ID.

type: "agent"Óāö

version: optional numberÓāö

The specific `agent` version to use. Omit to use the latest version. Must be at least 1 if specified.

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsMultiagentSelfParams object { type } Óāö

Sentinel roster entry meaning "the agent that owns this configuration". Resolved server-side to a concrete agent reference.

type: "self"Óāö

type: "coordinator"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsMultiagentRosterEntryParams = string or [BetaManagedAgentsAgentParams](api/beta.md) { id, type, version }  or [BetaManagedAgentsMultiagentSelfParams](api/beta.md) { type } Óāö

An entry in a multiagent roster: an agent ID string, a versioned agent reference, or `self`.

One of the following:

stringÓāö

BetaManagedAgentsOutcomeEvaluationResource object { completed\_at, description, explanation, 4 more } Óāö

Evaluation state for a single outcome defined via a define\_outcome event.

completed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

description: stringÓāö

What the agent should produce.

explanation: stringÓāö

Grader's verdict text from the most recent evaluation. For satisfied, explains why criteria are met; for needs\_revision (intermediate), what's missing; for failed, why unrecoverable.

iteration: numberÓāö

0-indexed revision cycle the outcome is currently on.

outcome\_id: stringÓāö

Server-generated outc\_ ID for this outcome.

result: stringÓāö

Current evaluation state. `pending` before the agent begins work; `running` while producing or revising; `evaluating` while the grader scores; `satisfied`/`max_iterations_reached`/`failed`/`interrupted` are terminal.

type: "outcome\_evaluation"Óāö

ÓÄ™

outcome\_evaluations: array of [BetaManagedAgentsOutcomeEvaluationResource](api/beta.md) { completed\_at, description, explanation, 4 more } Óāö

Per-outcome evaluation state. One entry per define\_outcome event sent to the session.

completed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

description: stringÓāö

What the agent should produce.

explanation: stringÓāö

Grader's verdict text from the most recent evaluation. For satisfied, explains why criteria are met; for needs\_revision (intermediate), what's missing; for failed, why unrecoverable.

iteration: numberÓāö

0-indexed revision cycle the outcome is currently on.

outcome\_id: stringÓāö

Server-generated outc\_ ID for this outcome.

result: stringÓāö

Current evaluation state. `pending` before the agent begins work; `running` while producing or revising; `evaluating` while the grader scores; `satisfied`/`max_iterations_reached`/`failed`/`interrupted` are terminal.

type: "outcome\_evaluation"Óāö

BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResource object { memory\_store\_id, type, access, 4 more } Óāö

A memory store attached to an agent session.

memory\_store\_id: stringÓāö

The memory store ID (memstore\_...). Must belong to the caller's organization and workspace.

type: "memory\_store"Óāö

ÓÄ™

access: optional "read\_write" or "read\_only"Óāö

Access mode for an attached memory store.

One of the following:

"read\_write"Óāö

"read\_only"Óāö

description: optional stringÓāö

Description of the memory store, snapshotted at attach time. Rendered into the agent's system prompt. Empty string when the store has no description.

instructions: optional stringÓāö

Per-attachment guidance for the agent on how to use this store. Rendered into the memory section of the system prompt. Max 4096 chars.

mount\_path: optional stringÓāö

Filesystem path where the store is mounted in the session container, e.g. /mnt/memory/user-preferences. Derived from the store's name. Output-only.

name: optional stringÓāö

Display name of the memory store, snapshotted at attach time. Later edits to the store's name do not propagate to this resource.

ÓÄ™

stats: [BetaManagedAgentsSessionStats](api/beta.md) { active\_seconds, duration\_seconds } Óāö

Timing statistics for a session.

active\_seconds: optional numberÓāö

Cumulative time in seconds the session spent in running status. Excludes idle time.

duration\_seconds: optional numberÓāö

Elapsed time since session creation in seconds. For terminated sessions, frozen at the final update.

ÓÄ™

status: "rescheduling" or "running" or "idle" or "terminated"Óāö

SessionStatus enum

One of the following:

"rescheduling"Óāö

"running"Óāö

"idle"Óāö

"terminated"Óāö

title: stringÓāö

type: "session"Óāö

updated\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

ÓÄ™

usage: [BetaManagedAgentsSessionUsage](api/beta.md) { cache\_creation, cache\_read\_input\_tokens, input\_tokens, output\_tokens } Óāö

Cumulative token usage for a session across all turns.

ÓÄ™

cache\_creation: optional [BetaManagedAgentsCacheCreationUsage](api/beta.md) { ephemeral\_1h\_input\_tokens, ephemeral\_5m\_input\_tokens } Óāö

Prompt-cache creation token usage broken down by cache lifetime.

ephemeral\_1h\_input\_tokens: optional numberÓāö

Tokens used to create 1-hour ephemeral cache entries.

ephemeral\_5m\_input\_tokens: optional numberÓāö

Tokens used to create 5-minute ephemeral cache entries.

cache\_read\_input\_tokens: optional numberÓāö

Total tokens read from prompt cache.

input\_tokens: optional numberÓāö

Total input tokens consumed across all turns.

output\_tokens: optional numberÓāö

Total output tokens generated across all turns.

vault\_ids: array of stringÓāö

Vault IDs attached to the session at creation. Empty when no vaults were supplied.

deployment\_id: optional stringÓāö

Deployment ID when the session was created from a deployment reference. Null otherwise.

id: [BetaManagedAgentsModel](api/beta.md)Óāö

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

"claude-fable-5" or "claude-opus-4-8" or "claude-opus-4-7" or 8 moreÓāö

The model that will power your agent.

See [models](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/models-overview) for additional details and options.

One of the following:

"claude-fable-5"Óāö

Next generation of intelligence for the hardest knowledge work and coding problems

"claude-opus-4-8"Óāö

Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding

"claude-opus-4-7"Óāö

Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding

"claude-opus-4-6"Óāö

Most intelligent model for building agents and coding

"claude-sonnet-4-6"Óāö

Best combination of speed and intelligence

"claude-haiku-4-5"Óāö

Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence

"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001"Óāö

Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence

"claude-opus-4-5"Óāö

Premium model combining maximum intelligence with practical performance

"claude-opus-4-5-20251101"Óāö

Premium model combining maximum intelligence with practical performance

"claude-sonnet-4-5"Óāö

High-performance model for agents and coding

"claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929"Óāö

High-performance model for agents and coding

"standard"Óāö

"fast"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsSessionAgentUpdate object { mcp\_servers, tools } Óāö

Mid-session agent configuration update. Only `tools` and `mcp_servers` are updatable. Full replacement: the provided array becomes the new value. To preserve existing entries, GET the session, modify the array, and POST it back.

ÓÄ™

mcp\_servers: optional array of [BetaManagedAgentsURLMCPServerParams](api/beta.md) { name, type, url } Óāö

Replacement MCP server list. Full replacement: the provided array becomes the new value. Send an empty array to clear; omit to preserve.

name: stringÓāö

Unique name for this server, referenced by mcp\_toolset configurations. 1-255 characters.

type: "url"Óāö

url: stringÓāö

Endpoint URL for the MCP server.

ÓÄ™

tools: optional array of [BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolset20260401Params](api/beta.md) { type, configs, default\_config }  or [BetaManagedAgentsMCPToolsetParams](api/beta.md) { mcp\_server\_name, type, configs, default\_config }  or [BetaManagedAgentsCustomToolParams](api/beta.md) { description, input\_schema, name, type } Óāö

Replacement tool list. Full replacement: the provided array becomes the new value. Send an empty array to clear; omit to preserve.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolset20260401Params object { type, configs, default\_config } Óāö

Configuration for built-in agent tools. Use this to enable or disable groups of tools available to the agent.

type: "agent\_toolset\_20260401"Óāö

ÓÄ™

configs: optional array of [BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolConfigParams](api/beta.md) { name, enabled, permission\_policy } Óāö

Per-tool configuration overrides.

ÓÄ™

name: "bash" or "edit" or "read" or 5 moreÓāö

Built-in agent tool identifier.

One of the following:

"bash"Óāö

"edit"Óāö

"read"Óāö

"write"Óāö

"glob"Óāö

"grep"Óāö

"web\_fetch"Óāö

"web\_search"Óāö

enabled: optional booleanÓāö

Whether this tool is enabled and available to Claude. Overrides the default\_config setting.

ÓÄ™

permission\_policy: optional [BetaManagedAgentsAlwaysAllowPolicy](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsAlwaysAskPolicy](api/beta.md) { type } Óāö

Permission policy for tool execution.

One of the following:

type: "always\_allow"Óāö

Tool calls require user confirmation before execution.

type: "always\_ask"Óāö

default\_config: optional [BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolsetDefaultConfigParams](api/beta.md) { enabled, permission\_policy } Óāö

Default configuration for all tools in a toolset.

enabled: optional booleanÓāö

Whether tools are enabled and available to Claude by default. Defaults to true if not specified.

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsMCPToolsetParams object { mcp\_server\_name, type, configs, default\_config } Óāö

Configuration for tools from an MCP server defined in `mcp_servers`.

mcp\_server\_name: stringÓāö

Name of the MCP server. Must match a server name from the mcp\_servers array. 1-255 characters.

type: "mcp\_toolset"Óāö

ÓÄ™

configs: optional array of [BetaManagedAgentsMCPToolConfigParams](api/beta.md) { name, enabled, permission\_policy } Óāö

Name of the MCP tool to configure. 1-128 characters.

enabled: optional booleanÓāö

Whether this tool is enabled. Overrides the `default_config` setting.

enabled: optional booleanÓāö

BetaManagedAgentsCustomToolParams object { description, input\_schema, name, type } Óāö

A custom tool that is executed by the API client rather than the agent. When the agent calls this tool, an `agent.custom_tool_use` event is emitted and the session goes idle, waiting for the client to provide the result via a `user.custom_tool_result` event.

description: stringÓāö

Description of what the tool does, shown to the agent to help it decide when to use the tool. 1-1024 characters.

ÓÄ™

input\_schema: [BetaManagedAgentsCustomToolInputSchema](api/beta.md) { type, properties, required } Óāö

JSON Schema for custom tool input parameters.

type: "object"Óāö

properties: optional map[unknown]Óāö

required: optional array of stringÓāö

name: stringÓāö

Unique name for the tool. 1-128 characters; letters, digits, underscores, and hyphens.

type: "custom"Óāö

BetaManagedAgentsSessionStats object { active\_seconds, duration\_seconds } Óāö

Timing statistics for a session.

active\_seconds: optional numberÓāö

Cumulative time in seconds the session spent in running status. Excludes idle time.

duration\_seconds: optional numberÓāö

Elapsed time since session creation in seconds. For terminated sessions, frozen at the final update.

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsSessionUpdatedEvent object { id, processed\_at, type, 3 more } Óāö

Emitted when an UpdateSession request changed at least one field. Carries only the fields that changed; absent fields were not part of the update. The new configuration applies from the next turn.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

processed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "session.updated"Óāö

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolResultEvent object { id, tool\_use\_id, type, 4 more } Óāö

Event sent by the client providing the result of an agent-toolset tool execution. Only valid on `self_hosted` environments, where sandbox-routed tools are executed by the client rather than the server.

The id of the `agent.tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

#### BetaSessionsEvents

##### [List Events](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md)

GET/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/events

##### [Send Events](api/beta/sessions/events/send.md)

POST/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/events

##### [Stream Events](api/beta/sessions/events/stream.md)

GET/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/events/stream

BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEvent object { id, input, name, 3 more } Óāö

Event emitted when the agent calls a custom tool. The session goes idle until the client sends a `user.custom_tool_result` event with the result.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

input: map[unknown]Óāö

Input parameters for the tool call.

name: stringÓāö

Name of the custom tool being called.

processed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "agent.custom\_tool\_use"Óāö

session\_thread\_id: optional stringÓāö

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its custom tool use on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.custom_tool_result` event to route the result back.

AgentEvaluatedPermission enum

BetaManagedAgentsBillingError object { message, retry\_status, type } Óāö

The caller's organization or workspace cannot make model requests ‚ÄĒ out of credits or spend limit reached. Retrying with the same credentials will not succeed; the caller must resolve the billing state.

message: stringÓāö

Human-readable error description.

ÓÄ™

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } Óāö

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying object { type } Óāö

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted object { type } Óāö

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal object { type } Óāö

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"Óāö

type: "billing\_error"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsCredentialHostUnreachableError object { credential\_id, message, retry\_status, 2 more } Óāö

An `environment_variable` credential's `auth.networking.allowed_hosts` includes a host the environment's network policy does not permit.

credential\_id: stringÓāö

ID of the affected credential.

message: stringÓāö

Human-readable error description.

ÓÄ™

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } Óāö

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying object { type } Óāö

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted object { type } Óāö

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal object { type } Óāö

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"Óāö

type: "credential\_host\_unreachable\_error"Óāö

vault\_id: stringÓāö

ID of the vault containing the affected credential.

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEventParams object { type, session\_thread\_id } Óāö

Parameters for sending an interrupt to pause the agent.

type: "user.interrupt"Óāö

session\_thread\_id: optional stringÓāö

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventParams object { result, tool\_use\_id, type, deny\_message } Óāö

"deny"Óāö

deny\_message: optional stringÓāö

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEventParams object { content, type } Óāö

Privileged context for the accompanying turn and all subsequent turns, appended to the session's system context as a `role: "system"` turn rather than replacing the top-level system prompt. At most one per request: it must be the final event and immediately follow the `user.message`, `user.tool_result`, or `user.custom_tool_result` it accompanies. Only supported on models that accept mid-conversation system messages.

BetaManagedAgentsMCPAuthenticationFailedError object { mcp\_server\_name, message, retry\_status, type } Óāö

Authentication to an MCP server failed.

mcp\_server\_name: stringÓāö

Name of the MCP server that failed authentication.

message: stringÓāö

Human-readable error description.

ÓÄ™

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } Óāö

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying object { type } Óāö

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted object { type } Óāö

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal object { type } Óāö

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"Óāö

type: "mcp\_authentication\_failed\_error"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent object { id, type, processed\_at, session\_thread\_id } Óāö

An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

type: "user.interrupt"Óāö

processed\_at: optional stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: optional stringÓāö

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent object { id, result, tool\_use\_id, 4 more } Óāö

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

ÓÄ™

result: "allow" or "deny"Óāö

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

"allow"Óāö

"deny"Óāö

tool\_use\_id: stringÓāö

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.tool\_confirmation"Óāö

deny\_message: optional stringÓāö

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

processed\_at: optional stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: optional stringÓāö

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsUserCustomToolResultEvent object { id, custom\_tool\_use\_id, type, 4 more } Óāö

Event sent by the client providing the result of a custom tool execution.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

custom\_tool\_use\_id: stringÓāö

The id of the `agent.custom_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.custom\_tool\_result"Óāö

ÓÄ™

content: optional array of [BetaManagedAgentsTextBlock](api/beta.md) { text, type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsImageBlock](api/beta.md) { source, type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsDocumentBlock](api/beta.md) { source, type, context, title }  or [BetaManagedAgentsSearchResultBlock](api/beta.md) { citations, content, source, 2 more } Óāö

The result content returned by the tool.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsTextBlock object { text, type } Óāö

BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent object { id, description, max\_iterations, 4 more } Óāö

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

Document referenced by URL.

type: "url"Óāö

url: stringÓāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent object { id, type, processed\_at, session\_thread\_id } Óāö

An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

type: "user.interrupt"Óāö

processed\_at: optional stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: optional stringÓāö

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent object { id, result, tool\_use\_id, 4 more } Óāö

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

ÓÄ™

result: "allow" or "deny"Óāö

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

"allow"Óāö

"deny"Óāö

tool\_use\_id: stringÓāö

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.tool\_confirmation"Óāö

deny\_message: optional stringÓāö

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

processed\_at: optional stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: optional stringÓāö

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsUserCustomToolResultEvent object { id, custom\_tool\_use\_id, type, 4 more } Óāö

Event sent by the client providing the result of a custom tool execution.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

custom\_tool\_use\_id: stringÓāö

The id of the `agent.custom_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.custom\_tool\_result"Óāö

title: stringÓāö

is\_error: optional booleanÓāö

Whether the tool execution resulted in an error.

processed\_at: optional stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: optional stringÓāö

Routes this result to a subagent thread. Copy from the `agent.custom_tool_use` event's `session_thread_id`.

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEvent object { id, input, name, 3 more } Óāö

Event emitted when the agent calls a custom tool. The session goes idle until the client sends a `user.custom_tool_result` event with the result.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

input: map[unknown]Óāö

Input parameters for the tool call.

name: stringÓāö

Name of the custom tool being called.

processed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "agent.custom\_tool\_use"Óāö

session\_thread\_id: optional stringÓāö

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its custom tool use on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.custom_tool_result` event to route the result back.

ÓÄ™

id: stringÓāö

Array of text blocks comprising the agent response.

text: stringÓāö

The text content.

type: "text"Óāö

processed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "agent.message"Óāö

ÓÄ™

Unique identifier for this event.

processed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "agent.thinking"Óāö

Name of the MCP server providing the tool.

name: stringÓāö

Name of the MCP tool being used.

processed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "agent.mcp\_tool\_use"Óāö

"allow"Óāö

"ask"Óāö

"deny"Óāö

error: [BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError](api/beta.md) { message, retry\_status, type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsModelOverloadedError](api/beta.md) { message, retry\_status, type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsModelRateLimitedError](api/beta.md) { message, retry\_status, type }  or 5 moreÓāö

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

One of the following:

BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError object { message, retry\_status, type } Óāö

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

message: stringÓāö

Human-readable error description.

ÓÄ™

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } Óāö

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying object { type } Óāö

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted object { type } Óāö

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal object { type } Óāö

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"Óāö

BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn object { type } Óāö

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction object { event\_ids, type } Óāö

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

event\_ids: array of stringÓāö

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

type: "requires\_action"Óāö

agent\_name: stringÓāö

processed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: stringÓāö

Public `sthr_` ID of the newly created thread.

type: "session.thread\_created"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEvent object { id, iteration, outcome\_id, 2 more } Óāö

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: numberÓāö

0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.

outcome\_id: stringÓāö

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_start"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent object { id, explanation, iteration, 6 more } Óāö

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal ‚ÄĒ no further evaluation cycles follow.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

explanation: stringÓāö

Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.

iteration: numberÓāö

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_evaluation\_start\_id: stringÓāö

The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.

outcome\_id: stringÓāö

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

result: stringÓāö

Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs\_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max\_iterations\_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet ‚ÄĒ one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_end"Óāö

ÓÄ™

usage: [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md) { cache\_creation\_input\_tokens, cache\_read\_input\_tokens, input\_tokens, 2 more } Óāö

Token usage for a single model request.

cache\_creation\_input\_tokens: numberÓāö

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

cache\_read\_input\_tokens: numberÓāö

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

input\_tokens: numberÓāö

Input tokens consumed by this request.

output\_tokens: numberÓāö

Output tokens generated by this request.

ÓÄ™

speed: optional "standard" or "fast"Óāö

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

"standard"Óāö

"fast"Óāö

ÓÄ™

processed\_at: stringÓāö

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent object { id, iteration, outcome\_id, 2 more } Óāö

Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: numberÓāö

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_id: stringÓāö

BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent object { id, description, max\_iterations, 4 more } Óāö

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

description: stringÓāö

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

max\_iterations: numberÓāö

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

outcome\_id: stringÓāö

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

processed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: stringÓāö

Public sthr\_ ID of the thread that started running.

type: "session.thread\_status\_running"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatusIdleEvent object { id, agent\_name, processed\_at, 3 more } Óāö

A session thread has yielded and is awaiting input. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

agent\_name: stringÓāö

Name of the agent the thread runs.

processed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: stringÓāö

Public sthr\_ ID of the thread that went idle.

ÓÄ™

stop\_reason: [BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction](api/beta.md) { event\_ids, type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted](api/beta.md) { type } Óāö

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn object { type } Óāö

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

type: "end\_turn"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction object { event\_ids, type } Óāö

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

event\_ids: array of stringÓāö

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

type: "requires\_action"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted object { type } Óāö

The turn ended because the retry budget was exhausted (`max_iterations` hit or an error escalated to `retry_status: 'exhausted'`).

type: "retries\_exhausted"Óāö

type: "session.thread\_status\_idle"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatusTerminatedEvent object { id, agent\_name, processed\_at, 2 more } Óāö

A session thread has terminated and will accept no further input. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

agent\_name: stringÓāö

Name of the agent the thread runs.

processed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: stringÓāö

Public sthr\_ ID of the thread that terminated.

type: "session.thread\_status\_terminated"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolResultEvent object { id, tool\_use\_id, type, 4 more } Óāö

Event sent by the client providing the result of an agent-toolset tool execution. Only valid on `self_hosted` environments, where sandbox-routed tools are executed by the client rather than the server.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

tool\_use\_id: stringÓāö

The id of the `agent.tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.tool\_result"Óāö

ÓÄ™

content: optional array of [BetaManagedAgentsTextBlock](api/beta.md) { text, type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsImageBlock](api/beta.md) { source, type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsDocumentBlock](api/beta.md) { source, type, context, title }  or [BetaManagedAgentsSearchResultBlock](api/beta.md) { citations, content, source, 2 more } Óāö

The result content returned by the tool.

BetaManagedAgentsTextBlock object { text, type } Óāö

text: stringÓāö

BetaManagedAgentsSessionUpdatedEvent object { id, processed\_at, type, 3 more } Óāö

Emitted when an UpdateSession request changed at least one field. Carries only the fields that changed; absent fields were not part of the update. The new configuration applies from the next turn.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

processed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "session.updated"Óāö

"claude-opus-4-8"Óāö

BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEvent object { id, content, type, processed\_at } Óāö

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction object { event\_ids, type } Óāö

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

event\_ids: array of stringÓāö

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

type: "requires\_action"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted object { type } Óāö

The turn ended because the retry budget was exhausted (`max_iterations` hit or an error escalated to `retry_status: 'exhausted'`).

type: "retries\_exhausted"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsSessionStatusIdleEvent object { id, processed\_at, stop\_reason, type } Óāö

Indicates the agent has paused and is awaiting user input.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

processed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

ÓÄ™

stop\_reason: [BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction](api/beta.md) { event\_ids, type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted](api/beta.md) { type } Óāö

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

One of the following:

BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn object { type } Óāö

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

type: "end\_turn"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction object { event\_ids, type } Óāö

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

event\_ids: array of stringÓāö

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

type: "requires\_action"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted object { type } Óāö

The turn ended because the retry budget was exhausted (`max_iterations` hit or an error escalated to `retry_status: 'exhausted'`).

type: "retries\_exhausted"Óāö

type: "session.status\_idle"Óāö

ÓÄ™

model\_usage: [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md) { cache\_creation\_input\_tokens, cache\_read\_input\_tokens, input\_tokens, 2 more } Óāö

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

"fast"Óāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage object { cache\_creation\_input\_tokens, cache\_read\_input\_tokens, input\_tokens, 2 more } Óāö

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

cache\_read\_input\_tokens: numberÓāö

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

input\_tokens: numberÓāö

Input tokens consumed by this request.

output\_tokens: numberÓāö

Output tokens generated by this request.

ÓÄ™

speed: optional "standard" or "fast"Óāö

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

"standard"Óāö

"fast"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent object { id, explanation, iteration, 6 more } Óāö

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal ‚ÄĒ no further evaluation cycles follow.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

explanation: stringÓāö

Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.

iteration: numberÓāö

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_evaluation\_start\_id: stringÓāö

The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.

outcome\_id: stringÓāö

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

result: stringÓāö

Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs\_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max\_iterations\_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet ‚ÄĒ one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_end"Óāö

ÓÄ™

usage: [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md) { cache\_creation\_input\_tokens, cache\_read\_input\_tokens, input\_tokens, 2 more } Óāö

Token usage for a single model request.

cache\_creation\_input\_tokens: numberÓāö

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

cache\_read\_input\_tokens: numberÓāö

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

input\_tokens: numberÓāö

Input tokens consumed by this request.

output\_tokens: numberÓāö

Output tokens generated by this request.

ÓÄ™

speed: optional "standard" or "fast"Óāö

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

"standard"Óāö

"fast"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent object { id, iteration, outcome\_id, 2 more } Óāö

Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: numberÓāö

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_id: stringÓāö

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_ongoing"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEvent object { id, iteration, outcome\_id, 2 more } Óāö

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: numberÓāö

0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.

outcome\_id: stringÓāö

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_start"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent object { id, type, processed\_at, session\_thread\_id } Óāö

type: "user.interrupt"Óāö

processed\_at: optional stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent object { id, result, tool\_use\_id, 4 more } Óāö

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

ÓÄ™

result: "allow" or "deny"Óāö

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

"allow"Óāö

"deny"Óāö

tool\_use\_id: stringÓāö

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.tool\_confirmation"Óāö

deny\_message: optional stringÓāö

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

processed\_at: optional stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: optional stringÓāö

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEvent object { id, input, name, 3 more } Óāö

Event emitted when the agent calls a custom tool. The session goes idle until the client sends a `user.custom_tool_result` event with the result.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

input: map[unknown]Óāö

Input parameters for the tool call.

name: stringÓāö

Name of the custom tool being called.

processed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "agent.custom\_tool\_use"Óāö

session\_thread\_id: optional stringÓāö

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its custom tool use on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.custom_tool_result` event to route the result back.

evaluated\_permission: optional "allow" or "ask" or "deny"Óāö

AgentEvaluatedPermission enum

One of the following:

"allow"Óāö

"ask"Óāö

"deny"Óāö

BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolUseEvent object { id, input, name, 4 more } Óāö

Event emitted when the agent invokes a built-in agent tool.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

Input parameters for the tool call.

name: stringÓāö

Name of the agent tool being used.

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "agent.tool\_use"Óāö

ÓÄ™

evaluated\_permission: optional "allow" or "ask" or "deny"Óāö

AgentEvaluatedPermission enum

One of the following:

"allow"Óāö

"ask"Óāö

"deny"Óāö

session\_thread\_id: optional stringÓāö

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its permission request on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.tool_confirmation` event to route the approval back.

BetaManagedAgentsSessionErrorEvent object { id, error, processed\_at, type } Óāö

An error event indicating a problem occurred during session execution.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

ÓÄ™

error: [BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError](api/beta.md) { message, retry\_status, type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsModelOverloadedError](api/beta.md) { message, retry\_status, type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsModelRateLimitedError](api/beta.md) { message, retry\_status, type }  or 5 moreÓāö

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError object { message, retry\_status, type } Óāö

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

message: stringÓāö

Human-readable error description.

ÓÄ™

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } Óāö

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying object { type } Óāö

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted object { type } Óāö

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal object { type } Óāö

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"Óāö

type: "unknown\_error"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsModelOverloadedError object { message, retry\_status, type } Óāö

The model is currently overloaded. Emitted after automatic retries are exhausted.

message: stringÓāö

Human-readable error description.

ÓÄ™

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } Óāö

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying object { type } Óāö

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted object { type } Óāö

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal object { type } Óāö

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"Óāö

type: "model\_overloaded\_error"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal object { type } Óāö

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"Óāö

type: "mcp\_connection\_failed\_error"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsMCPAuthenticationFailedError object { mcp\_server\_name, message, retry\_status, type } Óāö

Authentication to an MCP server failed.

mcp\_server\_name: stringÓāö

Name of the MCP server that failed authentication.

message: stringÓāö

Human-readable error description.

ÓÄ™

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } Óāö

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying object { type } Óāö

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted object { type } Óāö

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal object { type } Óāö

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"Óāö

type: "mcp\_authentication\_failed\_error"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsBillingError object { message, retry\_status, type } Óāö

The caller's organization or workspace cannot make model requests ‚ÄĒ out of credits or spend limit reached. Retrying with the same credentials will not succeed; the caller must resolve the billing state.

message: stringÓāö

Human-readable error description.

ÓÄ™

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted object { type } Óāö

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal object { type } Óāö

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"Óāö

ÓÄ™

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } Óāö

One of the following:

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying object { type } Óāö

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted object { type } Óāö

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal object { type } Óāö

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn object { type } Óāö

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction object { event\_ids, type } Óāö

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted object { type } Óāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Emitted when a subagent is spawned as a new thread. Written to the parent thread's output stream so clients observing the session see child creation.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

agent\_name: stringÓāö

Name of the callable agent the thread runs.

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: stringÓāö

Public `sthr_` ID of the newly created thread.

type: "session.thread\_created"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEvent object { id, iteration, outcome\_id, 2 more } Óāö

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: numberÓāö

0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.

outcome\_id: stringÓāö

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_start"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent object { id, explanation, iteration, 6 more } Óāö

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal ‚ÄĒ no further evaluation cycles follow.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

explanation: stringÓāö

Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.

iteration: numberÓāö

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_evaluation\_start\_id: stringÓāö

The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.

outcome\_id: stringÓāö

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

result: stringÓāö

Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs\_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max\_iterations\_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet ‚ÄĒ one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_end"Óāö

ÓÄ™

usage: [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md) { cache\_creation\_input\_tokens, cache\_read\_input\_tokens, input\_tokens, 2 more } Óāö

Token usage for a single model request.

cache\_creation\_input\_tokens: numberÓāö

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

cache\_read\_input\_tokens: numberÓāö

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

input\_tokens: numberÓāö

Input tokens consumed by this request.

output\_tokens: numberÓāö

Output tokens generated by this request.

ÓÄ™

speed: optional "standard" or "fast"Óāö

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

"standard"Óāö

"fast"Óāö

ÓÄ™

One of the following:

"standard"Óāö

"fast"Óāö

processed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "span.model\_request\_end"Óāö

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent object { id, iteration, outcome\_id, 2 more } Óāö

Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: numberÓāö

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_id: stringÓāö

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_ongoing"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent object { id, description, max\_iterations, 4 more } Óāö

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

description: stringÓāö

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

max\_iterations: numberÓāö

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

outcome\_id: stringÓāö

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

processed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

"claude-sonnet-4-5"Óāö

High-performance model for agents and coding

"claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEvent object { id, content, type, processed\_at } Óāö

A mid-conversation system message event. Carries system-role content that is appended to the session as a `role: "system"` turn.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

ÓÄ™

content: array of [BetaManagedAgentsSystemContentBlock](api/beta.md) { text, type } Óāö

System content blocks. Text-only.

text: stringÓāö

The text content.

type: "text"Óāö

type: "system.message"Óāö

processed\_at: optional stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEventParams object { content, type } Óāö

Privileged context for the accompanying turn and all subsequent turns, appended to the session's system context as a `role: "system"` turn rather than replacing the top-level system prompt. At most one per request: it must be the final event and immediately follow the `user.message`, `user.tool_result`, or `user.custom_tool_result` it accompanies. Only supported on models that accept mid-conversation system messages.

ÓÄ™

content: array of [BetaManagedAgentsSystemContentBlock](api/beta.md) { text, type } Óāö

System content blocks to append. Text-only.

text: stringÓāö

The text content.

type: "text"Óāö

type: "system.message"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsTextBlock object { text, type } Óāö

Regular text content.

text: stringÓāö

The text content.

type: "text"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsTextRubric object { content, type } Óāö

Rubric content provided inline as text.

content: stringÓāö

Rubric content. Plain text or markdown ‚ÄĒ the grader treats it as freeform text.

type: "text"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsTextRubricParams object { content, type } Óāö

Rubric content provided inline as text.

content: stringÓāö

Rubric content. Plain text or markdown ‚ÄĒ the grader treats it as freeform text. Maximum 262144 characters.

type: "text"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError object { message, retry\_status, type } Óāö

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

message: stringÓāö

Human-readable error description.

ÓÄ™

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } Óāö

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying object { type } Óāö

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted object { type } Óāö

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal object { type } Óāö

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"Óāö

type: "unknown\_error"Óāö

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent object { id, description, max\_iterations, 4 more } Óāö

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

description: stringÓāö

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

max\_iterations: numberÓāö

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

outcome\_id: stringÓāö

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

processed\_at: stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent object { id, result, tool\_use\_id, 4 more } Óāö

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

id: stringÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

ÓÄ™

result: "allow" or "deny"Óāö

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

"allow"Óāö

"deny"Óāö

tool\_use\_id: stringÓāö

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.tool\_confirmation"Óāö

deny\_message: optional stringÓāö

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

processed\_at: optional stringÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: optional stringÓāö

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventParams object { result, tool\_use\_id, type, deny\_message } Óāö

Parameters for confirming or denying a tool execution request.

ÓÄ™

result: "allow" or "deny"Óāö

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

"allow"Óāö

"deny"Óāö

tool\_use\_id: stringÓāö

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.tool\_confirmation"Óāö

deny\_message: optional stringÓāö

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolResultEventParams object { tool\_use\_id, type, content, is\_error } Óāö

Parameters for providing the result of an agent-toolset tool execution. Only valid on `self_hosted` environments, where sandbox-routed tools are executed by the client rather than the server.

tool\_use\_id: stringÓāö

The id of the `agent.tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.tool\_result"Óāö

#### BetaSessionsResources

##### [Add Session Resource](api/beta/sessions/resources/add.md)

POST/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/resources

##### [List Session Resources](api/beta/sessions/resources/list.md)

GET/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/resources

##### [Get Session Resource](api/beta/sessions/resources/retrieve.md)

GET/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/resources/{resource\_id}

##### [Update Session Resource](api/beta/sessions/resources/update.md)

POST/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/resources/{resource\_id}

##### [Delete Session Resource](api/beta/sessions/resources/delete.md)

DELETE/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/resources/{resource\_id}

BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResource object { memory\_store\_id, type, access, 4 more } Óāö

A memory store attached to an agent session.

memory\_store\_id: stringÓāö

The memory store ID (memstore\_...). Must belong to the caller's organization and workspace.

type: "memory\_store"Óāö

ÓÄ™

access: optional "read\_write" or "read\_only"Óāö

Access mode for an attached memory store.

One of the following:

"read\_write"Óāö

"read\_only"Óāö

description: optional stringÓāö

Description of the memory store, snapshotted at attach time. Rendered into the agent's system prompt. Empty string when the store has no description.

instructions: optional stringÓāö

Per-attachment guidance for the agent on how to use this store. Rendered into the memory section of the system prompt. Max 4096 chars.

mount\_path: optional stringÓāö

Filesystem path where the store is mounted in the session container, e.g. /mnt/memory/user-preferences. Derived from the store's name. Output-only.

name: optional stringÓāö

Display name of the memory store, snapshotted at attach time. Later edits to the store's name do not propagate to this resource.

ÓÄ™
